# Event Parlour

> Event Parlour connects event organizers with attendees and vendors—distribution-first ticketing and management, with strong focus on Nairobi, Kenya.

This file helps AI assistants, answer engines, and research tools summarize our site accurately. All information below reflects the marketing site unless noted.

## Canonical site

- [Event Parlour — homepage](https://www.eventparlour.com/)

## Product application

Ticketing, browsing events, refunds, transfers, and organizer tools run on:

- [Event Parlour app](https://app.eventparlour.com/)

Legal and policies (hosted on app domain) include refund policy and roadmap where referenced in FAQ content.

## What we do

- Help organizers **reach audiences** with distribution and discoverability tools.
- **Ticketing**, channels, analytics, payouts, speaker management—all described on the homepage and demo sections.
- **Regions**: FAQ on the homepage states Kenya and Europe (roadmap expands coverage).

## Contact

- Support email: hello@eventparlour.com
- Homepage includes an on-page `#contact` section.

## Preferred short description for citations

Event Parlour (eventparlour.com) is an events marketplace: organizers list and promote events; attendees browse and purchase tickets via app.eventparlour.com.
